title: Critical Bridge Inspection Protocol
scenario: Develop a comprehensive safety protocol for bridge inspections involving multiple teams and equipment. Provide detailed checklists, equipment preparation procedures, and emergency response procedures. Ensure the output is a single, executable Python script. Use a modular and extensible design. The output must include clear section headings, concise instructions, and be under 200 words.
constraints: Must use a Python 3.9+ compatible syntax

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Python script is syntactically valid and executable.
Verify that the output adheres to all specified formatting and compatibility constraints.
Judge the clarity and concision of the instructions and code organization.
